case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ENMANUEL JESUS BENCOMO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
